pages.text: Foragers walk the unclaimed land beyond your borders gathering fruit, mushrooms, flowers, and other wild growth. They are a cheap, early food and material source that needs no fields or pens.

Foragers are also your quiet supply line for crafting. Scavenging grass yields plant fiber and, once Animal Husbandry is known, wheat seeds for your farmers; cutting leaves yields sticks. This is what keeps the fletching and crafting chains self-sustaining.
Herbalism lets foragers gather signature herbs — poison plants and the remedies that cure them. A forager is the front of nearly every gathered supply chain you build.
